turns.speaker: D
turns.text: kelly wood . date of birth , february 15th , 1979 . established patient here for renal ultrasound because of hematuria . urine dipstick today . negative for leukocytes , nitrates , protein , ketone , bilirubin and glucose . color yellow and clear , urobilinogen 0.2 , ph 5.5 and specific gravity 1.020 . there is a trace amount of blood in the urine and intact . renal ultrasound impression . right kidney is 10 cm in length by five centimeter wide . there are no stones , masses or hydronephrosis . the left kidney is 10.8 centimeters in length and five centimeters wide . there is a six millimeter left renal stone non-obstructing . 533 milliliters pre-void and 0 milliliters post-void . hi , mrs. wood . the doctor sees kelly wood is just finished the ultrasound .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , ma'am .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: well , the renal ultrasound results look like kelly wood has one stone in the left kidney but the left renal stone is not obstructing anything .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: kelly wood knew the problem had to be a kidney stone . kelly wood passed what looked like two small stones last week after kelly wood scheduled this appointment . and then for the past six weeks , kelly wood has had a few episodes of bright red urine the color of , like , cherry kool-aid . and last week , kelly wood was constantly having to pee and urinating hurt something terrible .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how bad was kelly wood's pain on a scale of zero to 10 ? zero being no pain and 10 being worse , as the doctor can imagine .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , at the time , kelly wood would say the pain was an eight .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: is kelly wood having any flank pain now or tenderness in kelly wood's lower back ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , after passing those stones , kelly wood's symptoms have felt a lot better .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that's good to hear . now , it looks like kelly wood is only taking alavert 10 milligrams a day and has no drug allergies . is that correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that's right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , let's take a look at kelly wood today . let's use the doctor's default pe . well , mrs. wood , the doctor knows that the blood in kelly wood's urine was due to the kidney stones . fortunately , kelly wood passed two kidney stones last week and the blood in kelly wood's urine has nearly subsided . kelly wood does still have one stone in the left kidney . since the left renal stone is not obstructing or causing pain , the doctor does n't recommend any surgical intervention at this time .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: kelly wood would like to know what kelly wood can do to stop getting these stones .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: as the doctor and kelly wood discussed last time , the formation of kidney stones can not be attributed to a particular cause . but several factors increase the risk , such as dehydration , family history , certain foods , digestive tract disease and certain medical conditions .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , kelly wood knows kelly wood does n't drink near the amount of water that kelly wood should . kelly wood drinks more mountain dew than anything .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: kelly wood should drink about half of kelly wood's body weight in ounces of water a day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , if kelly wood weight 250 pounds , kelly wood should drink ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that would be 125 ounces of water a day and kelly wood should avoid drinking sugary drinks like mountain dew .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . is there any food kelly wood should n't eat ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great question . kelly wood should avoid food rich in sodium oxalate and animal protein . so that would be salty , processed food because salty , processed food are high in sodium . ideally , kelly wood should consume less than 1,000 milligrams of sodium a day and reduce the amount of beef , poultry , fish , and pork .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: what's oxalate ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: oxalate is an organic acid found in plants , that when digested , oxalate binds to minerals that stones are formed from . foods like spinach , chocolate , beets , rhubarb and soy products .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , kelly wood will do whatever it takes to try to avoid getting these stones again .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great . and here's a handout that kelly wood can look over . the handout goes over the dietary recommendations and what to avoid .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , good . kelly wood likes to have things in writing to help kelly wood remember .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: perfect . well , if kelly wood has any more questions . if kelly wood do n't have any more questions , kelly wood is all set . the doctor wo n't need to see kelly wood back until next year , as long as kelly wood do n't have any more issues like bleeding or pain . if kelly wood do have any issues , kelly wood can always call the office sooner . and if kelly wood experience any severe pain or bright red blood in kelly wood's urine , kelly wood should go to the emergency room .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right . well , let's hope kelly wood and the doctor do n't have to do either of those and kelly wood sees the doctor next year .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yes , let's hope . come right this way and the doctor will walk kelly wood to check out . update pe abdomen . no flank pain . anti gu . normal vaginal exam . primary diagnosis is hematuria . secondary diagnosis is chronic urol ... urolithiasis . thank you . this completes mrs. wood encounter .
